org.key_project.isabelletranslation.translation.IsabelleHandler

Package
Description
org.key_project.isabelletranslation.translation
 

  • Uses of IsabelleHandler in org.key_project.isabelletranslation.translation

    Classes in org.key_project.isabelletranslation.translation that implement IsabelleHandler
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    BooleanOpHandler
    This class handles the translation of boolean operations and Boolean formulae
    class 
    BSumHandler
    This class handles the translation of the bounded sum function.
    class 
    DefinedSymbolsHandler
    This class handles the translation of several functions that are already defined in the preamble.
    class 
    FieldHandler
    This class handles the translation of field values.
    class 
    InfiniteUnionHandler
    This class handles the infiniteUnion function.
    class 
    InstanceOperatorHandler
    This class handles translation of the instance and exactInstance function.
    class 
    IntegerOpHandler
    This class handles translation of the integer operators.
    class 
    LogicalVariableHandler
    Handles the translation of LogicVariables.
    class 
    NumberConstantsHandler
    This handler is responsible to render number constants Z(3(2(1(#)))) as "123".
    class 
    ObserverFunctionHandler
    Handles translation of Observer functions.
    class 
    PolymorphicHandler
    This handles translation of equals and if-then-else
    class 
    QuantifierHandler
    This handles translation of quantifiers.
    class 
    SeqDefHandler
    Handles translation of seqDef function.
    class 
    SortDependingFunctionHandler
    Handles translation of sort depending functions
    class 
    UninterpretedSymbolsHandler
    This handler is a fallback handler that introduces a new uninterpreted function symbol with prefix in subscript
    Methods in org.key_project.isabelletranslation.translation that return types with arguments of type IsabelleHandler
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<IsabelleHandler>
    IsabelleHandlerServices.getFreshHandlers(Services services, @NonNull String[] handlerNames, String[] handlerOptions, IsabelleMasterHandler mh)
    Get a copy of freshly created IsabelleHandlers by cloning the reference handlers.
    Collection<IsabelleHandler>
    IsabelleHandlerServices.getTemplateHandlers(String[] handlerNames)
    Load the original/template IsabelleHandler instances (from the snippetMap) of all handlers specified as arguments.
